Student Clubs

Student clubs, which enrich academic life at our university through their activities in social, cultural, artistic and sporting fields, make students’ free time enjoyable, help boost their self-confidence and play a significant role in enriching their intellectual development.

In addition to our university’s academic staff, experts invited from outside the university also act as advisors to the clubs.
